overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a suburban Los Santos neighborhood at night. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses a street intersection, and walks along an elevated pathway while streetlights illuminate palm trees and residential houses.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential sidewalk with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk approaching a street intersection

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the residential street
standard metal mailbox on a post near the curb
illuminated street lamp on black metal pole
well-maintained green grass between sidewalk and street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk in a suburban neighborhood at night, passing a mailbox and palm trees under the glow of streetlights. Residential houses line the street as the character approaches an intersection.

events.description: steps off concrete sidewalk onto asphalt crosswalk to cross the street
traffic light changes from red to green allowing vehicles to proceed while character crosses

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, moving from one sidewalk to the other between waiting vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan waiting at the red light before proceeding through the intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light for vehicles
white painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing
landscaped median with small bushes dividing the road

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the asphalt crosswalk and crosses the intersection. Traffic lights change from red to green as vehicles wait and then proceed. The character moves between the white crosswalk lines toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban sidewalk with pedestrian traffic and iron fencing

events.description: overtakes a woman in a beige coat and sunhat walking in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, overtaking pedestrians and following a woman in a beige coat and hat

notable_agents.action: woman in beige coat and sunhat walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall black wrought iron fence running along the left side of the sidewalk
green public trash receptacle on the sidewalk edge
landscaping bushes behind the iron fence

segments.scene_description: Back on the concrete sidewalk, the character walks past a black iron fence and landscaping, overtaking a woman in a beige coat. Other pedestrians are visible ahead as the sidewalk curves gently through the residential area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone walkway overlooking the street

events.description: passes a jogger running in the opposite direction along the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated stone walkway, passing a jogger and overlooking the street below with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: jogger in dark clothing running toward the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the left side of the elevated walkway
textured stone tile pavement replacing the concrete sidewalk
illuminated buildings and skyline visible in the distance
vehicles parked along the street below the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The walkway transitions to an elevated stone-paved path with a retaining wall on the left, overlooking a street with moderate traffic below. The character passes a jogger while distant city lights become visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet suburban neighborhood at night that gradually ascends to an elevated urban vantage point. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk past mailboxes and palm trees, moving under the warm glow of streetlights toward a nearby intersection. As the character steps onto the asphalt crosswalk, the scene shifts to the rhythm of the street where traffic lights change from red to green and vehicles begin to proceed. The camera then follows the character back onto the sidewalk, passing a black iron fence and a woman in a beige coat as the path curves through the residential area. Finally, the walkway transitions into an elevated stone-paved path with a retaining wall, passing a jogger while the perspective opens up to reveal distant city lights against the dark night sky.
